ddls:
CREATE TABLE "questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question */,
  "question_number" INTEGER /* Question number in the exam */,
  "max_points" INTEGER /* Maximum points available for the question */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the question */,
  "passing_threshold" INTEGER /* Passing threshold for the question */,
  "difficulty_level" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the question (e.g., easy, medium, hard) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the question was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the question */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the faculty member who created the question */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the question is active and can be used in exams */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the category is active and can be used in exams */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exams" (
  "exam_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exam */,
  "exam_name" TEXT /* Name of the exam */,
  "total_max_points" INTEGER /* Total maximum points available for the exam */,
  "total_passing_threshold" INTEGER /* Total passing threshold for the exam */,
  "exam_date" TEXT /* Date when the exam is scheduled */,
  "duration_minutes" INTEGER /* Duration of the exam in minutes */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the exam was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the exam */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the exam is active and can be taken by students */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exam_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exam_questions" (
  "exam_question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exam-question mapping */,
  "exam_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exam */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question */,
  "sequence_number" INTEGER /* Order of questions in the exam */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the mapping was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the mapping */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exam_question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exam_questions_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exam_questions_exam_id FOREIGN KEY ("exam_id") REFERENCES exams ("exam_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the class or section of the student */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the student record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the student record */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the student is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exam_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "exam_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exam */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score obtained by the student for the question */,
  "attempted_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the student attempted the question */,
  "is_correct" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the student's answer was correct */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the result was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exam_results_exam_id FOREIGN KEY ("exam_id") REFERENCES exams ("exam_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exam_results_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exam_results_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id")
)
